results.title: Will Ferrell Impersonates ‘Today’ Host’s Famous Dad to Her Face
results.description: Today with Jenna & Sheinelle/YouTube Jenna Bush Hager had a feeling it was coming. Will Ferrell appeared on Jenna & Sheinelle on Thursday to promote his new Netflix show, The Hawk, with the rest of the cast. And while there, he resurrected his impersonation of Bush’s father, George W. Bush, drawing a big smile from Bush’s TV host daughter. “I was hoping this was coming,” she said. Read more at The Daily Beast.

results.title: House Republicans' $95 billion Iran war package clears first hurdle
results.description: Republicans on the House Budget Committee have advanced a $95 billion package for the Iran war, farm aid and President Donald Trump’s push for strict new voter ID requirements.

results.title: Trump suspends teleprompter operator over betting claims
results.description: US President Donald Trump has suspended a teleprompter operator over allegations he placed bets with a prediction market on the content of Mr Trump's speeches, the White House said.
